== Notes for [[Item:Q2247|Q2247]] ==

{geni:about_me} HE WAS A CONTEMPORARY OF GAUTAMA BUDDHA AND KING BIMBISARA OF MAGADHA. HIS SISTER KOUSHALA DEVI, WAS MARRIED TO BIMBISARA. THE CITY OF KASHI (VARANASI) WAS GIVEN AS A DOWRY TO HER. AFTER BIMBISARA WAS MURDERED BY HIS OWN SON AJATSHATRU, PRASENJIT UNDERTOOK A LONG SERIES OF WARS WITH AJATSHATRU. HE ALSO RESPECTED BUDDHA, WHO WAS ALSO A KSHATRIYA FROM SOLAR DYNASTY. IN BUDDHIST LITERATURE HE IS ADDRESSES AS "PASENADI." .

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
